title: Quick Search
text: Quick Search Use the Quick Search box to find and replace strings in the code of the current main development object. Regular expressions are supported. Figure 1. Quick Search box in Search mode Figure 2. Quick Search box in Replace mode Table 1. Quick Search Commands Icon Command Description Search backwards Search backwards. The default search direction is forwards. Match case Find matching strings that also match the case of the search string. Match whole word Find matching strings that are preceded or followed by non-word characters such as spaces, commas, and periods. Match start of word Find matching strings that are preceded by non-word characters such as spaces. Use regular expressions Interpret the search string as a regular expression. Wrap around When the end of the code container is reached, continue searching at the beginning (or the other way around, when searching backwards). How to Find and Replace Strings in Code Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
